summary: Frontend verification of Iteration 22 ‚Äî Info Center 4-tab modal (Vacoas Info Center). All 8 scenarios PASS (INFO-1..6, RG1, RG2) after fixing a prop-name mismatch in Dashboard.jsx that prevented the Info Center modal from opening. Backend was previously verified by pytest (12/12).

ui_bugs.issue: Prop name mismatch: Dashboard.jsx passed `onMeteoClick`, but MapMauritius destructures `onInfoCenterClick` (renamed in this iteration). Result: clicking the [data-testid="map-info-center"] info pin did NOTHING ‚Äî the modal never opened, blocking the entire feature. Fixed in this iteration (testing agent applied glue fix).

action_items: Review the Dashboard.jsx prop-rename fix (onMeteoClick ‚Üí onInfoCenterClick). Already applied by testing agent ‚Äî verify it matches your intended API.
Pre-existing minor: 2 x 401 console errors on initial /dashboard load (likely an /api/auth/me call before cookie is hydrated). Not introduced by this iteration but worth a glance.
critical_code_review_comments: InfoCenter.jsx lazy-fetch cache works perfectly: each of /meteo/trails, /info/events, /info/transport, /info/safety is hit EXACTLY once per modal session, even after weather‚Üíevents revisit (verified via page.on('request')).

InfoCenter.jsx uses queueMicrotask wrappers around setState inside .then/.catch/.finally ‚Äî this is unusual and not strictly necessary since React 18+ batches updates; consider removing for readability, but it works correctly.

MapMauritius pin rename is good (data-testid=map-info-center), but the parent Dashboard.jsx was not updated in lockstep ‚Äî classic rename leak. A grep for the old `onMeteoClick` name in the repo would have caught this in CI.

Transient label 'Registering‚Ä¶' on the book-transfer CTA flips back so fast (stub endpoint responds in <100ms) that even rAF sampling sometimes misses it. Functional state (`booking`/`setBooking`) and disabled attr are correctly wired ‚Äî not a bug, just very fast UX.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 22 Info Center modal is fully wired. The map pin is reachable via data-testid='map-info-center'. Dashboard passes onInfoCenterClick (fixed in this iter). Endpoints used: GET /meteo/trails, GET /info/events, GET /info/transport, GET /info/safety, POST /info/transport/book (stub returns AND-T-{epoch}). Lazy cache per tab confirmed via page.on('request'). RG2 avatar HUD testid is `avatar-hud-bubble` (not `avatar-hud`).

rca of the issue.bug: Clicking the Info Center map pin did not open the modal.
rca of the issue.root_cause: Pin component in MapMauritius.jsx (line 18) was renamed to expect prop `onInfoCenterClick`, but Dashboard.jsx (line 157) was still passing the old name `onMeteoClick`. The pin's onClick handler called `onInfoCenterClick && onInfoCenterClick()` ‚Äî which was undefined, so the click was a no-op.
rca of the issue.reproduction: 1) Login admin. 2) On /dashboard, click [data-testid="map-info-center"]. Expected: modal opens. Actual (before fix): nothing happens, no console error, no API call.
rca of the issue.fix_applied: In /app/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx, renamed the prop on the MapMauritius JSX element from `onMeteoClick` to `onInfoCenterClick`. One-line edit. Hot-reload picked it up; subsequent test run opened the modal cleanly and all 8 scenarios passed.

verified_scenarios.INFO-1: PASS ‚Äî 4 tabs present: weather, events, transport, safety.
verified_scenarios.INFO-2: PASS ‚Äî 8 holidays (info-holiday-{date}), 4 events (info-event-{id}); time markers 'in N days' and tradition badges (Christian, Hindu, ‚Ä¶) rendered.
verified_scenarios.INFO-3: PASS ‚Äî POST /api/info/transport/book ‚Üí 200, reference AND-T-1780819577, toast 'Interest registered ‚Äî ref AND-T-‚Ä¶' shown. info-rideshare/info-taxis/info-transit/info-road-advisories all rendered. Empty road_advisories rendered 'All roads clear right now' branch. Transient 'Registering‚Ä¶' label exists in code; flips back too fast (<100ms) to capture reliably but `booking` state + disabled wiring confirmed correct.
verified_scenarios.INFO-4: PASS ‚Äî info-cyclone data-cyclone-level=0, info-surf renders size+note, 6 beaches (le-morne/tamarin/flic-en-flac/grand-baie/blue-bay/belle-mare) each with valid data-rip-profile (low/moderate/high).
verified_scenarios.INFO-5: PASS ‚Äî Endpoint GET counts after navigating weather‚Üíevents‚Üítransport‚Üísafety‚Üíweather‚Üíevents: {/meteo/trails:1, /info/events:1, /info/transport:1, /info/safety:1}. Cache hit confirmed.
verified_scenarios.INFO-6: PASS ‚Äî Weather tab still renders info-current, info-forecast, info-trails.
verified_scenarios.RG1: PASS ‚Äî Closing returns to map (modal unmounted); reopening resets to weather tab (active=info-center-tab-weather).
verified_scenarios.RG2: PASS ‚Äî avatar-hud-bubble visible bottom-left; clicking it opens CharacterSheet (data-testid='character-sheet'); no z-index/event conflicts with Info Center.
